content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 30, 2002

John Foster
1025 Hickory Avenue
Fairfield, CA 94533

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance
Our File No. I-02-217

Dear Mr. Foster:

We have received your August 9, 2002, request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 Since your request is general in nature and does not identify a particular governmental decision before the City of Fairfield Planning Commission, we are providing you with informal assistance.

You have inquired about the conflict-of-interest rules pertaining to real estate professionals. We have enclosed the following materials to assist you:

1) “Can I Vote? Conflict of Interest Overview”
2) Regulations 18703.3 (see subdivision (c)), 18706, and 18707.9
3) Olson Advice Letter, No. A-00-237

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

NB:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\02-217

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
